templates.name: C# Basic Webserver
templates.description: ASP.NET Core server with health endpoint and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a C# web server using ASP.NET Core
templates.summary: A minimal ASP.NET Core web server with hot reload via dotnet watch, Docker multi-stage build, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: Designsystemet Basic React App
templates.description: React app with Designsystemet components, Vite, and TypeScript
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a blog page using Designsystemets components and styling with React/Vite
templates.summary: A React application using Designsystemet from Digdir with blog cards, Vite for development, TypeScript support, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: Go Basic Webserver
templates.description: Go web server using net/http with health endpoint and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a web server using Gos standard library
templates.summary: A minimal web server using Gos standard net/http package with a health check endpoint, Docker multi-stage build, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: Java Basic Webserver
templates.description: Spring Boot server with health endpoint and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a Java web server using Spring Boot
templates.summary: A minimal Spring Boot web server with health check endpoints via Actuator, Docker multi-stage build, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: PHP Basic Webserver
templates.description: PHP web server using built-in server with health endpoint and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a PHP web server using PHPs built-in server
templates.summary: A minimal PHP web server using PHPs built-in server with a health check endpoint, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: Python Basic Webserver
templates.description: Minimal Flask server with health endpoint and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a Python web server using Flask
templates.summary: A minimal Python web server using Flask with a health check endpoint, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow. Ideal for microservices and API backends.

templates.name: TypeScript Basic Webserver
templates.description: Express.js server with TypeScript, health endpoint, and Docker support
templates.abstract: Provides a minimal starting point for developers who want to build a Node.js web server using Express and TypeScript
templates.summary: A minimal Express.js web server written in TypeScript with hot reload via nodemon, Docker containerization, Kubernetes deployment manifests, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow.

templates.name: Plan-Based AI Workflow
templates.description: Structured AI development with plans, phases, and validation
templates.abstract: Provides a complete AI-assisted development workflow with investigation plans, phased implementation, and human-in-the-loop validation. Includes CLAUDE.md, plan templates, and git safety rules.
templates.summary: A structured AI development workflow that guides AI coding assistants through investigation, planning, and phased implementation. Includes CLAUDE.md, 6 portable docs, plan templates, and git safety rules. Designed for human-in-the-loop collaboration.
